code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: MUST include <Reasoning> (brief analysis) and <Rating> (1-5) tags
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment based solely on the review text
    - Base rating on holistic satisfaction, not isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1★ (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards/multi-purchase failures overriding positives
    - Fundamental usability failures despite concept appeal
    - Explicit "avoid purchase" warnings with defect evidence
    - Negative updates erase previous satisfaction
    - Premature failure (≤6 months) with functional consequences

    2★ (Negative):
    - Core functionality requires excessive workarounds
    - Partial functionality with persistent frustration
    - Clearly inferior to alternatives in critical aspects
    - "Regret purchase" statements with justification
    - Comparative inferiority without safety hazards

    3★ (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with contextual limitations
    - Conditional recommendations ("works if...")
    - Adequate performance with notable compromises
    - Target-specific adequacy without endorsement

    4★ (Positive):
    - Single functional flaw impacting core utility
    - Requires preprocessing/break-in for full function
    - Minimal functional praise without enthusiastic language
    - Praise focused on aesthetics/organization without functional benefits
    - Explicit star deduction phrases ("only 4 because...")
    - Material construction flaws impacting durability

    5★ (Very Positive):
    - Concise praise with enthusiastic tone or exceeding expectations
    - 3+ functional aspects praised (durability/design/utility)
    - Solves persistent problems exceeding expectations
    - Non-functional criticism WITH enthusiastic core praise
    - Practical benefits significantly outweigh limitations
    - Explicit "still 5 stars" endorsements despite imperfections
    - Design praise combined with functional superiority

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Works as intended" + neutral tone →4 / enthusiastic →5
    - Praise + functional flaw →4 / + non-functional →5
    - Multi-purchase failures →1 regardless of initial experience
    - Close brand comparisons →5 if satisfaction maintained
    - Core function achieved post-setup →5 if flawless performance
    - Premature single failure →1 if ≤6 months with functional impact
    - Aesthetic praise alone →4 unless combined with functional excellence
    - Brief effectiveness claims →5 only with enthusiastic modifiers
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Second unit failed faster. Dangerous defects!"
<Reasoning>Multi-purchase safety failures override positives →1</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Not much to say. They work!"
<Reasoning>Minimal functional praise without enthusiasm →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "These not only look great but are actually usable - finally functional napkins!"
<Reasoning>Combines aesthetics with functional improvement →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Love the design! Fits perfectly in my kitchen organizer."
<Reasoning>Aesthetic praise without functional benefits →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Nearly matches Lodge! Daily driver despite minor differences"
<Reasoning>Close brand comparison with satisfaction →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Good for light use. Thin material concerns for heavy loads"
<Reasoning>Adequate with notable compromise →3</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Works but constantly needs readjusting. Exhausting"
<Reasoning>Excessive workarounds →2</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "Non-stick coating sprays off after 3 washes. Great colors though."
<Reasoning>Material flaw impacts function despite aesthetics →4</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Rollers handle bumps perfectly! Installation took muscle"
<Reasoning>Core excellence outweighs setup effort →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Does exactly what needed - deep pockets fit any mattress"
<Reasoning>Concise functional praise exceeding expectations →5</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (32 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 10
  gold 4 -> 3: 4
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 1 -> 3: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I really like these potholders. They look great and do a good job of keeping hot pots and pans and other dishes out of the oven off the table and counters. They had a bit of a plastic smell when they arrived but after I washed them (they held up fine..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This machine seems determined to foil every effort I make to clean my carpets. The bottom section never works. It's job is to collect the dirty water, but since the top section hardly puts any water out at all, it doesn't have much to do. I have labo..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "It's a very solid bed that feels like it's going to hold up to just about anything. Assembly wasn't too difficult, though there were a couple of parts that had to be under some pressure to get the screw holes to line up just right. Also, when we firs..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I was actually looking for smaller pie cover; really only wanting something that would cover and keep my pumpkin pie from drying out when it was in the fridge.

For that purpose this Pie holder is overkill. It's LARGE. It's tall enough for meringues ..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "The towels are definitely cute and well made. Very attractive. The only reason Im not giving them five stars is because they aren't very absorbent. Out of the package they aren't really absorbent at all. Throw them in the wash with some fabric soften..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Grunds bathmat is 100% certified organic cotton  with the main section being long straight cotton fibers and it has three stripes of loops on each end. This fiber is not treated with bleach, formaldehyde,  or any other harmful toxic substances. This ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 32 errors, 19 borderline out of 80 examples."}
